const Fixtures = [

    },
    {

        result: "W",

        homeScore: 3,
        awayScore: 9,

        result: "L",
        homeTeam: "Tigers",
        awayTeam: "Stony Stratford",
        homeScore: 0,

    {

        result: "W",
        homeTeam: "Mortonville Juniors",

        awayScore: 6,

    },
];

export default Fixtures;
